metadata.title:
CANADIAN PACIFIC BRANCH FROM


SPOKANE TO VANCOUVER WITHIN YEAR

pages.raw_text:
The mysterious buying in Spo-
kane, evidently designed to con-
meet the Canadian Pacific entrance
into Spokane over the Spokane Il
International with the North Coast
terminals on Front avenue. very
likely has a solution in the follow
ing United Press dispatch to The
Press today:


VANCOUVER, B. c., July 81
II Is learned that the Canadian
Pacific is preparing to build a
short line between Spokane and
Vancouver. 1t recently acquired
the charter of road between Mid
way and Vernon which was left
unfinished by the promoters.


1t is reported the new line will
be in operation within a year.


This Is considered a direct reply
to Hills entrance into Canadian
Pacific territory.


The North Coasts present ter.
minal on the coast is Seattle. AS a
Canadian Pacific branch this gives
the latter road an entrance of its
own into the principal coast port
and the stronghold of the Pacific
of the Hills. The Canadian line
will here come into direct competi.
ton with the Great Northern on the
latter roads own grounds.


A road from Spokane to Vancou-
yer would cover any point that
might be left open in this territory
to the Hill lines, should they de.
eide to retaliate further.


At any rate the move makes
Spokane the converging point for
the Canadian Pacific in the north.
west and the battle-ground of the
big lines in their struggle for com
mercial advantage. 1t is the Ca.
madam Pacific that is spending
money here now. It needs the yard
room. II Is already In town from
the west over the North Coast, un.
less the Hill forces can swing the
council to shut the road out in final
consideration of the franchise.
